merged.title: MiniMax 2.5: The Ultimate Review and API Setup Guide (2026)
merged.content:
MiniMax 2.5 costs $0.10 per million tokens for standard API access. In contrast, GPT-4o charges approximately $0.50 per million tokens, while Claude Sonnet 3.5 costs around $0.30 per million tokens. Therefore, organizations processing 100 million tokens monthly save $8,000-$40,000 annually by switching to MiniMax. Furthermore, video generation is included in base pricing, unlike competitors who charge separately for visual content creation.

### What makes MiniMax 2.5’s video generation unique? [...] ### What are the rate limits for MiniMax 2.5?

Free-tier accounts receive 1,000 requests per day with 100 requests per minute (RPM). Specifically, paid subscribers access 100,000+ daily requests with burst capacity up to 500 RPM. Moreover, enterprise customers negotiate custom limits based on projected usage volumes. Furthermore, rate limits apply separately to text and video generation endpoints. Therefore, high-volume applications require paid subscriptions, while development and testing work well on free tier.

### Can I use MiniMax 2.5 for commercial projects? [...] ### Step 2: API Key Generation & Rate Limit Configuration

Generating your API credentials requires careful attention. First, navigate to the “API Keys” section in your developer dashboard. Subsequently, click “Create New Key” and select your intended use case from the dropdown menu. Specifically, MiniMax offers different key types: Development, Production, and Enterprise.

Rate limits vary significantly by tier. Consequently, free-tier developers receive 1,000 requests per day with 100 requests per minute. In contrast, paid subscribers access 100,000+ daily requests with burst capacity up to 500 RPM. Furthermore, enterprise customers negotiate custom limits based on projected usage.

## Overview

MiniMax M2was released on October 23, 2025. Pricing starts at $0.255 per million input tokens and $1.00 per million output tokens. The model supports a context window of up to 197K tokens. API access is available through Minimax.

HOW IT WORKS

## Simple Credit System

Credits are the universal currency. One simple system for all professional music generation.

### Standard Generation

1 Credit

per complete song

### Never Expire

Forever

account lifetime

SUPPORT HUB

## Frequently Asked Questions

01

### Is this a one-time payment? Are there any other fees?

Absolutely. This is a one-time payment for the credits. No subscription fees or hidden costs.

02

### Do the purchased credits expire? [...] 02

### Do the purchased credits expire?

No. All credits you purchase are valid forever with no time restrictions.

03

### How are credits consumed?

Each song generation costs 1 credit, regardless of length or complexity.

04

### What if I run out of credits?

You can buy any package as many times as you need, and credits will be added to your existing balance.

05

### What payment methods are supported?

We use Stripe and accept all major credit cards like Visa, MasterCard, and American Express.

### Can I download the generated music?

Yes, you can download your music in high-quality audio formats for any projects.

merged.title: Free AI API Credits 2026: Every Provider Compared
merged.content:
Haiku stretches your free credits the furthest - ideal for testing high-volume use cases. For production-grade Claude access, credit programs offer $1,000 to $25,000+ through AI Perks.

## Google Gemini API: The Most Generous Free Tier in 2026

Google Gemini offers the most generous free tier of any major AI API - unlimited free access to all models with no credit card and no dollar credits needed. You simply sign up, get an API key, and start making requests.

The free tier is rate-limited rather than credit-based:

| Model | Free Tier Rate Limit | Paid Tier Rate Limit |
 --- 
| Gemini 2.0 Flash | 15 RPM / 1,000 RPD | 2,000 RPM |
| Gemini 2.5 Pro | 5 RPM / 100 RPD | 1,000 RPM |
| Gemini 2.5 Flash | 10 RPM / 500 RPD | 2,000 RPM |

RPM = requests per minute. RPD = requests per day. [...] ## Start Building With Free AI Credits Today

Every major AI API provider offers free credits or free-tier access in 2026. Sign up for all of them, collect your $200+ in combined free credits, and start building immediately.

When you are ready to scale beyond the free tier, credit programs offer $10,000 to $150,000+ across every provider. AI Perks covers them all - from the team that came through Y Combinator, Techstars, Antler, 500 Global, and Google for Startups.

Subscribe at getaiperks.com →

Stop paying for AI APIs. Get $10,000+ in free credits at getaiperks.com.

AI Perks

AI Perks curates and provides access to exclusive discounts, credits, and deals on AI tools, cloud services, and APIs to help startups and developers save money.

Explore all AI Perks [...] Pro tip: You do not have to choose just one. Sign up for all of them. Use Gemini for prototyping, xAI for heavy testing, and OpenAI or Anthropic for production validation. Combined, you get $200+ in credits and unlimited rate-limited access across every major AI model in 2026.

## Free Tiers Run Out Fast - Here's How to Get $10,000+

Free sign-up credits cover hours of testing, not months of building. Here is the math:

A developer making 500 API calls per day with a mid-tier model (GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet, or Grok-3) spends roughly $50-$150 per month in API costs. OpenAI's $5 free tier lasts 1-3 days at that pace. Even xAI's generous $175/month runs out within weeks of serious development.

# Pricing Overview

MiniMax has independently developed a wide range of modalities including text, audio, video, image, and music. We offer various pricing plans to meet usage requirements across different scenarios.

Experience MiniMax’s full-spectrum multimodal AI (Text, Audio, Image, Video, Music). Our flexible pricing ensures the best value for every scale of usage.

# Pricing Overview

MiniMax has independently developed a wide range of modalities including text, audio, video, image, and music. We offer various pricing plans to meet usage requirements across different scenarios.

Experience MiniMax’s full-spectrum multimodal AI (Text, Audio, Image, Video, Music). Our flexible pricing ensures the best value for every scale of usage.

Free AI API Credits 2026: Every Provider Compared
blog.content:
Haiku stretches your free credits the furthest - ideal for testing high-volume use cases. For production-grade Claude access, credit programs offer $1,000 to $25,000+ through AI Perks.

## Google Gemini API: The Most Generous Free Tier in 2026

Google Gemini offers the most generous free tier of any major AI API - unlimited free access to all models with no credit card and no dollar credits needed. You simply sign up, get an API key, and start making requests.

The free tier is rate-limited rather than credit-based:

| Model | Free Tier Rate Limit | Paid Tier Rate Limit |
 --- 
| Gemini 2.0 Flash | 15 RPM / 1,000 RPD | 2,000 RPM |
| Gemini 2.5 Pro | 5 RPM / 100 RPD | 1,000 RPM |
| Gemini 2.5 Flash | 10 RPM / 500 RPD | 2,000 RPM |

RPM = requests per minute. RPD = requests per day. [...] ## Start Building With Free AI Credits Today

Every major AI API provider offers free credits or free-tier access in 2026. Sign up for all of them, collect your $200+ in combined free credits, and start building immediately.

When you are ready to scale beyond the free tier, credit programs offer $10,000 to $150,000+ across every provider. AI Perks covers them all - from the team that came through Y Combinator, Techstars, Antler, 500 Global, and Google for Startups.

Subscribe at getaiperks.com →

Stop paying for AI APIs. Get $10,000+ in free credits at getaiperks.com.

AI Perks

AI Perks curates and provides access to exclusive discounts, credits, and deals on AI tools, cloud services, and APIs to help startups and developers save money.

Explore all AI Perks [...] Pro tip: You do not have to choose just one. Sign up for all of them. Use Gemini for prototyping, xAI for heavy testing, and OpenAI or Anthropic for production validation. Combined, you get $200+ in credits and unlimited rate-limited access across every major AI model in 2026.

## Free Tiers Run Out Fast - Here's How to Get $10,000+

Free sign-up credits cover hours of testing, not months of building. Here is the math:

A developer making 500 API calls per day with a mid-tier model (GPT-4.1, Claude Sonnet, or Grok-3) spends roughly $50-$150 per month in API costs. OpenAI's $5 free tier lasts 1-3 days at that pace. Even xAI's generous $175/month runs out within weeks of serious development.

HOW IT WORKS

## Simple Credit System

Credits are the universal currency. One simple system for all professional music generation.

### Standard Generation

1 Credit

per complete song

### Never Expire

Forever

account lifetime

SUPPORT HUB

## Frequently Asked Questions

01

### Is this a one-time payment? Are there any other fees?

Absolutely. This is a one-time payment for the credits. No subscription fees or hidden costs.

02

### Do the purchased credits expire? [...] 02

### Do the purchased credits expire?

No. All credits you purchase are valid forever with no time restrictions.

03

### How are credits consumed?

Each song generation costs 1 credit, regardless of length or complexity.

04

### What if I run out of credits?

You can buy any package as many times as you need, and credits will be added to your existing balance.

05

### What payment methods are supported?

We use Stripe and accept all major credit cards like Visa, MasterCard, and American Express.

### Can I download the generated music?

Yes, you can download your music in high-quality audio formats for any projects.
